lines.speaker: Gwerin Hapus
lines.text: Hello! What can I do for you today?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's nice to meet you Gwerin, I'm [player name].

lines.speaker: Gwerin Hapus
lines.text: And it's great to meet you, [player name].

lines.speaker: Gwerin Hapus
lines.text: I'm the village miller. I keep the wheat growing strong and turn it into flour.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wonderful! This sure is an impressive mill.

lines.speaker: Gwerin Hapus
lines.text: Thank you! I try to keep it clean. Feel free to use the mill whenever you please.

lines.speaker: Gwerin Hapus
lines.text: Was there anything else you wanted?
